title: How to pay – Remit (pay) the GST/HST by instalments - Canada.ca
content:
Remit (pay) the GST/HST by instalments
To make your GST/HST instalment payments, use Form RC160, Remittance Voucher – Interim Payments. This form is only available in a personalized and printed format. You still have to make your payment by the due date even if you do not receive your remittance form on time. To order Form RC160 , go to Order remittance vouchers or payment forms .
To make instalment payments online, you may use your bank or credit union’s online banking site or mobile banking app. You do not need a remittance voucher to pay online. For more information, go to Pay online with your bank or credit union .
Another way to make instalment payments online is to use My Payment . This secure electronic service allows you to make payments directly to the CRA from a participating Canadian bank or credit union using your bank access card (Visa Debit or Debit Mastercard).
You may schedule pre-authorized debits from your Canadian chequing account on specific dates. To authorize this agreement, use your CRA account .
For all payment options, go to Make a payment – Payments to the CRA .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
